about.title: About Me
about.bio: I am a passionate Full Stack Developer with expertise in building modern, high-performance web applications. I specialize in Vue, Nuxt, Node.js, and creating immersive user experiences.

descriptions.Node.js: Proficient in building scalable backend services, REST APIs, and microservices.
descriptions.TypeScript: Strong typing expertise, design patterns, and application architecture.
descriptions.Express / NestJS: Framework experience for structured and enterprise-ready backend logic.
descriptions.Vue.js / Nuxt 3: Expert in composition API, state management, layouts, SSR, and hybrid rendering.
descriptions.JavaScript: Deep core JS expertise, asynchronous flows, DOM scripting, and performance optimization.
descriptions.Tailwind CSS: Highly skilled in utility-first design, styling systems, and fully responsive layouts.
descriptions.PostgreSQL: Relational data modeling, advanced queries, indexes, and schema optimizations.
descriptions.MongoDB: NoSQL document structures, aggregations, and database integrations.
descriptions.Redis: In-memory caching strategies, pub/sub architecture, and session management.
descriptions.Docker: Containerization, environment configuration, and container deployment workflows.
descriptions.Git & GitHub: Version control, branch management, collaborative workflows, and CI/CD pipelines.
descriptions.Linux: Server administration, shell scripting, hosting, and command line tools.
